overall.description: A cinematic aerial journey through a desert wasteland environment from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning with a sweeping vista of Night City and solar arrays from a rocky cliff, descending through cactus-filled terrain, and transitioning to a paved desert road at sunset.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff overlook with futuristic city vista

events.description: camera begins panning right to reveal solar array farm while maintaining forward movement

agents.ego_description: surveying the vast desert landscape and distant city skyline from an elevated vantage point

entered.detail: cluster of tall glass and steel skyscrapers visible through atmospheric haze
tall cylindrical industrial tower standing prominently in the valley
series of circular solar panel installations arranged in the desert basin
reddish-brown rocky outcrop forming the foreground elevation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sweeping vista from a rocky desert cliff, showcasing a futuristic city skyline in the far distance through golden hour haze. A prominent central tower and extensive solar array farms occupy the middle ground as the camera slowly pans right and begins descending forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert badlands with scattered cacti and abandoned structures

events.description: camera descends from cliff overlook to ground level, entering desert terrain
camera passes the abandoned cliff structure and continues through cactus field

agents.ego_description: traversing the desert floor through patches of cacti and desert scrub toward the distant road

entered.detail: large derelict industrial installation perched on the cliff edge
scattered saguaro cacti and desert vegetation covering the sandy ground
distant mountain peaks with light cloud cover becoming visible as city exits frame

segments.scene_description: The camera descends to ground level and moves through the desert badlands, passing a large abandoned structure on the cliff edge. The futuristic city disappears from view as the camera traverses through fields of cacti and Joshua trees, with distant mountains becoming the new backdrop.

events.description: camera transitions from dirt terrain onto paved desert road
abandoned building complex becomes visible on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: traveling along the paved desert road at steady speed, passing utility poles and approaching abandoned structures

entered.detail: two-lane asphalt road with faded yellow dividing lines stretching into the distance
weathered wooden power poles with crossbars and transformers lining the road
derelict multi-story industrial building with broken windows situated beside the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a paved desert road stretching toward the horizon, flanked by wooden utility poles and power lines. The camera moves steadily along the asphalt, passing an abandoned industrial building on the left as the sun continues to cast long golden shadows across the empty highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent from a high rocky vista overlooking a futuristic skyline into the desolate expanse of a desert highway at sunset. It begins with a sweeping view of a distant city and vast solar array farms through a golden haze, panning right as the camera starts to dive forward. As the camera reaches ground level, the city disappears from view and the landscape shifts into rugged badlands filled with cacti and Joshua trees against a backdrop of distant mountains. The scene then transitions from the wild terrain to a paved desert road, moving steadily along the asphalt past wooden utility poles and an abandoned industrial building. Finally, the camera glides toward the horizon as the sinking sun casts long, golden shadows across the empty highway.
